ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the site belongs to */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of monitoring site */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sites_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site responsible for the reading */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the reading was taken */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "aqi" INTEGER /* AQI value */,
  "aqi_index" INTEGER /* AQI index value */,
  "aqi_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the AQI category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the AQI reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_readings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_readings_aqi_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqi_category_id") REFERENCES aqi_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defining_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defining_parameters_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES aqi_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading the flag belongs to */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "flag_value" TEXT /* Value of the flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES aqi_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site the instrument belongs to */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument */,
  "instrument_calibration_date" TEXT /* Calibration date of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_instruments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site the maintenance was performed on */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_maintenance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqi_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "aqi_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the AQI category */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was observed */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aqi_trends_aqi_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqi_category_id") REFERENCES aqi_categories ("category_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the state the county belongs to
Reference to the county the site belongs to
Reference to the site responsible for the reading
Reference to the reading the parameter belongs to
Unit of measurement for the parameter
Reference to the reading the flag belongs to
Reference to the site the instrument belongs to
Unique identifier for each maintenance record
Reference to the site the maintenance was performed on
